title: colymbada minoa
side_effects: Colymbada minoa can have side effects if used improperly, such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its high concentration of volatile compounds like thujone. Prolonged consumption can lead to more severe health issues, including seizures, tremors, and respiratory problems in some individuals. In rare cases, excessive use of the plant can also cause allergic reactions, such as skin irritation and itching. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using Colymbada minoa for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
